title: Kaleidoscope World Liquor
description: This mod adds more alcoholic drinks for the Kaleidoscope Tavern.
body:
This is an expansion add-on for Kaleidoscope Tavern.
It adds a variety of well-known real-world wines and spirits,such as Bombay Sapphire Gin, Smirnoff Vodka, Spirytus Vodka, Moutai, Bacardi White Rum, and many other classic liquors.
